transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Cane Sugar, Skim Milk, Cocoa, Salt.
notes: Direct dairy phrase should stay full, not collapse to just milk.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Egg Yolk, Sunflower Oil, Salt.
notes: Direct egg phrase should stay full, not collapse to just egg.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Wheat Starch, Sea Salt, Baking Soda.
notes: Direct wheat phrase should include the Gluten-free conflict.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Brown Rice Syrup, Rye Malt, Salt.
notes: Diet-only gluten conflict from rye/malt without a codebook allergen.
Direct soy phrase should stay full.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Brown Rice Flour, Cocoa Powder, Salt.
notes: Simple contains statement with no direct allergen ingredient.
Direct milk plus separate declaration evidence for wheat and soy.

transcriptLines: PACKAGED ON SHARED EQUIPMENT WITH MILK AND EGG.
notes: Shared-equipment wording with two cross-contact flags.

transcriptLines: PROCESSED IN A FACILITY THAT ALSO PROCESSES FISH AND SHELLFISH.
notes: Facility cross-contact for both fish and shellfish.

transcriptLines: PRODUCED ON A SHARED LINE WITH WHEAT.
notes: Shared-line wording should map to cross-contamination.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Oat Milk Powder, Pea Protein, Salt.
notes: Plant milk negative: do not map oat milk to dairy milk.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Soy Milk Powder, Rice Syrup, Salt.
notes: Soy milk should map to soy only, not dairy milk.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Coconut Cream Powder, Tapioca Syrup, Salt.
notes: Coconut cream should not map to dairy milk or tree nut here.
Parenthetical milk disclosure should collapse to the minimal allergen phrase.
Parenthetical shellfish disclosure should collapse to the minimal allergen phrase.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Dried Whole Milk, Egg Albumen, Salt.
notes: Two direct animal-derived phrases with full bounded ingredient names.
Direct ingredient evidence plus separate declaration evidence for egg.
Direct milk phrase plus separate declaration evidence for milk.
Multiline direct ingredient plus cross-contact declaration.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Flavor Base (Fish), Soy Sauce Powder, Salt.
notes: Parenthetical fish disclosure plus direct soy phrase and separate soy declaration.
